plan.annotation: Milestones are spaced by elapsed days; the blind review gate is emphasized as the approval checkpoint before the harness update.

operations.label: Time-proportional milestone placement
operations.value: Five milestones spaced by elapsed days: Jul 1, Jul 3, Jul 6, Jul 9, Jul 11

operations.label: Emphasize the blind review gate
operations.value: Blind review completed July 9 rendered as the largest, central gate milestone before approval

operations.label: Bind ledger dates to milestones
operations.value: Question frozen Jul 1; evidence collected Jul 3; candidates generated Jul 6; blind review completed Jul 9; harness update approved Jul 11

plan.pptxFallback: In PowerPoint, the timeline is delivered as an editable line with five editable milestone shapes and bound date labels; any motion is removed before export so nothing is flattened into a single raster image.
plan.takeaway: Research moved from a frozen question on July 1 to an approved harness update on July 11, with blind review as the decision gate.
plan.title: From Question to Approved Harness Update
